case_title: UNION STREET INVESTORS VS. ELAINE APATANG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION TODD ROTHBARD FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNION STREET INVESTORS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT APATANG, ELAINE
WRIT FULLY SATISFIED AS TO THE REAL PROPERTY ONLY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT APATANG, ELAINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APATANG, ELAINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2228 UNION STREET, APARTMENT #106, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94123, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNION STREET INVESTORS AS TO DEFENDANT APATANG, ELAINE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNION STREET INVESTORS SERVED NOV-13-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APATANG, ELAINE
